sentences.arabic: الرِّيَاضَةُ تُسَاعِدُ الإِنْسَانَ عَلَى الشُّعُورِ بِالسَّعَادَةِ.
sentences.translation: Sport pomaže čovjeku da se osjeća sretno.
sentences.translationEn: Exercise helps a person feel happy.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ الْجَرْيِ لِنِصْفِ سَاعَةٍ شَعَرَ وَلِيدٌ بِخِفَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Nakon trčanja pola sata Walid se osjetio lako.
sentences.translationEn: After running for half an hour Walid felt light.

sentences.translation: Briga je otišla a radost je došla.
sentences.translationEn: The worry went away and joy came.

sentences.translation: Kretanje i aktivnost čine um mirnijim.
sentences.translationEn: Movement and activity make the mind calmer.
